name: Pre-Quant TTT 11ep + Val-Calibrated GPTQ + Legal Eval-Time TTT — Triple-Stack Synthesis
author: owizdom
blurb: First submission to stack three independently-legal val-data adaptations: (1) Pre-Quant AdamW TTT 11ep with freeze_blocks=0 (Track A, baked into artifact, builds on PR #1487), (2) Val-Calibrated GPTQ that computes Hessian H=X^T X from validation activations to align quantization with the eval distribution (novel on the modern stack; PR #1019 ablated this on its older base), (3) Eval-Time Legal Score-First TTT 2ep with score-before-update ordering (Track B, builds on PR #1493). Three knobs attack the 0.0187 BPB quantization gap measured in PR #1487 from independent angles. Architecture, optimizer, training loop, and quantization machinery are byte-identical to PR #1487 — only ~100 lines added (collect_hessians_val function) and 8 hyperparameter defaults flipped.

credits.pr1487_ndokutovich: base train_gpt.py, pre-quant TTT 10ep, recur345, par7, EMA, QK5.25, MuonEq-R, SDClip GPTQ
credits.pr1493_bigbag: eval-time legal score-first TTT compliance + tuning
credits.pr1019_abaybektursun: val-calibrated GPTQ ablation, SDClip GPTQ machinery
credits.pr1394_clarkkev: SP8192 + GPTQ embeddings + MuonEq-R + depth recurrence
credits.pr1413_dexhunter: legal score-first TTT framework + SP8192 base
